---
name: Template Request
about: Suggest a new template
title: '[Template] '
labels: enhancement, good first issue
---

## Template Category

Which category does this template belong to?
- [ ] Landing Page
- [ ] Dashboard / Admin
- [ ] UI Component
- [ ] Project Setup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___________

## What It Should Generate

Describe what the template should produce. Be specific about sections, features, or components.

Example: "A hero section with animated gradient background, feature cards grid, testimonials carousel, and a pricing table with toggle for monthly/annual billing."

## Design Preferences

- Color scheme: (e.g. dark, light, purple, neutral)
- Framework: (e.g. plain HTML/CSS, Tailwind, React)
- Style: (e.g. minimal, bold, glassmorphism, neumorphic)
- Reference sites or designs: (optional URLs)

## Use Case

Who would use this template and for what purpose?

## Additional Notes

Any other context, examples, or mockups you'd like to share.

---

> This is a good first issue for contributors new to the project.
> See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the template format.
